title: Pūnaha Hoa
attention: Ehara tēnei hōtaka hoa i te hōtaka mō te tūtohu o 'ngā mema whānau' rānei 'ngā kiritaki.' Pānuitia {faqLink} i mua i te haere tonu.
earnPerSale: Whiwhi {amount} mō ia hoko kiritaki hou!
earnDescription: Mā te tāpiri i tētahi hononga ki InterServer i tō pae tukutuku, ka whiwhi koe i te utu {amount} mō ia hoko hou e puta mai ana i te pāwhiri i te hononga i tō pae tukutuku.
shareUrl: Tohaina tō URL hoa motuhake ki ngā hoa
exportFailedText: Kāore i āhei ki te tikiake i te kōnae.

status.title: Āhua
status.defaultDesc: Kua rēhitatia te kiritaki i raro i tētahi hoa engari kāore anō kia tutuki ngā whakahau.
status.pendingDesc: Kua tutuki ngā whakahau wā me te utu a te kiritaki, ā kei te tatari ana ki te whakamana o te kaiwhakahaere.
status.failedDesc: Kāore te kiritaki i tutuki i ngā whakahau, i takahi rānei te hoa i ngā tikanga ki te whiwhi kiritaki.
status.lockedDesc: Kua kūnekia te pūkete kiritaki, kāore anō e whai hua.
status.rejectedDesc: Kua hinga tūāhuatia te pūkete ki te tutuki i ngā whakahau.
status.paidDesc: Kua utua kē te hoa mō tēnei hainatanga kiritaki.

paymentSetup.title: Tautuhinga Utu
paymentSetup.choosePayment: Kōwhiria tāu e hiahia ana ki te mahi me ō utu hoa
paymentSetup.createPrepay: Waihanga he Utu Ā-mua me te rahinga ki te aunoa whakamahi i runga i ōku pire.

webTrafficPage.loadInNewTab: Uta whārangi ki tētahi taabu hou (kia tūpato mō ngā kuki e tautuhia ana)
webTrafficPage.viewInNewTab: Tiro Whārangi ki Tētahi Taabu Hou (kia tūpato mō ngā kuki e tautuhia ana)

dockSetup.title: Tautuhinga Taunga
dockSetup.couponTooltip: Ina whakamahia tēnei kaupuni e tētahi kiritaki hou, ka tohua rātou hei kiritaki i ārahina e koe ā ka rārangi hei hokohoko hoa.
dockSetup.descriptionPlaceholder: Whakamahia tēnei kaupuni ina tuku ota ki te whiwhi i te marama tuatahi mō te manaaki mō te penihana kotahi.

faqPage.title: Pātai Auau
faqPage.a1: Ka utua e mātou he utu $100 mō ia hokohoko, ā ko tēnei tētahi o ngā hōtaka hoa utu nui rawa atu.
faqPage.q2: 2. E hia te roa ka puta mai ai tētahi hokohoko ki tōku pūkete?
faqPage.q3: 3. I hokohoko tata nei ahau. Ki hea e kite ana ahau?
faqPage.a3_step2: I te taha matau o raro ka kitea e koe tētahi kōwhiringa Tiro Whārangi Hoa.
faqPage.a3_step3: I konei ka kite koe i ō utu katoa e tatari ana me ērā kua whakaaetia.
faqPage.q4: 4. E mōhio ana ahau ki tētahi e hiahia ana ki te manaaki. Me pēhea āku mahi ki te whiwhi utu tūtohu?
faqPage.a4_step2: Neke ki raro ki te tūtata ki tō hononga hoa.
faqPage.a4_step3: Tukua tēnei hononga ki tō hoa e hiahia ana ki te manaaki.
faqPage.a4_step4: Ina pāwhiria e rātou taua hononga ā ota ana rātou i tētahi pūkete i a mātou, ka whiwhi koe i tētahi utu.
faqPage.q5: 5. Kua whakaaetia ahau mō te hōtaka hoa manaaki InterServer. Ināianei he aha āku mahi?
faqPage.a5_step1: Takiuru ki tō pūkete hoa ki te uru ki ngā rauemi hokohoko InterServer mā te pāwhiri i te taabu Ngā Pene me Ngā Hononga.
faqPage.a5_step2: Kōwhiria te rauemi hokohoko e hiahia ana koe ki te tāpiri ki tō pae.
faqPage.a5_step3: Ka kitea e koe ngā waehere pene i te taha matau o ngā pene katoa; tāruaruatia tēnei waehere ki tō pae.
faqPage.a5_step4: Ina pāwhiria e tētahi taua hononga ā hoko ana rātou i tētahi pūkete manaaki, ka whiwhi koe i tētahi utu.
faqPage.q6: 6. Ka taea e ahau te PPC bid ki te whakatairanga i te Manaaki InterServer?
faqPage.a6_line1: Āe, engari kaua e bid mō tō mātou ingoa pakihi, hurihanga o tō mātou ingoa pakihi, hē takahia, i tētahi kuputuhi rānei kei roto tētahi wāhanga o reira tae atu ki InterServer, InterServer Hosting.
faqPage.a6_line2: Arotahi ki ngā bid mō ngā kuputuhi pēnei i te manaaki tere, manaaki PHP, manaaki WordPress.
faqPage.a6_line3: Whakapā mai mēnā e hiahia ana koe ki te āwhina ki te whakaaro kuputuhi.
faqPage.a6_line4: Mauria kia tāpiri InterServer, InterServer Hosting, InterServer.net, InterServer web hosting hei kuputuhi hōtaka kūhara.
faqPage.q7: 7. I hokohoko ahau. Ināianei āhea utua ai ahau?
faqPage.a7_line1: I muri i ngā rā 90 ka huri tētahi hokohoko tika mai i te āhua Taunoa ki te E tatari ana.
faqPage.a7_line2: Ka E tatari ana te hokohoko, ka utua i roto i ngā rā 7 tuatahi o te marama.
faqPage.q8: 8. He hokohoko e tatari ana ōku kāore i utua.
faqPage.a8_line1: Tērā pea he take maha mō tēnei. I ētahi wā ka hiahia mātou ki tāpiri wā ki te whakamana i tētahi hokohoko.
faqPage.a8_line2: Ko tētahi mea ngāwari ki te tiaki ko te mauria kua tautuhia tō tikanga utu.
faqPage.q9: 9. E hia te roa ka noho E tatari ana ai ōku hokohoko/utu tae noa ki tō rātou whakaaetanga?
faqPage.q10: 10. Ka taea e ahau te whakamahi i tōku hononga hoa mō ngā tūtohu-ake i runga i ngā pūkete mā tōku whakamahi whaiaro?
faqPage.a10: Kāo. Ko tāu whakapā ki tētahi pūkete i hoko anōtia ka puta ko te hinga aunoa o te hokohoko.
faqPage.q11: 11. He aha te take i whakahokia ai tōku utu?
faqPage.a11_intro: Ko te whakahokia e tohu ana kua hinga tūāhuatia te utu.
faqPage.a11_reason1: Kua hainatia kē te kiritaki ki a mātou i mua.
faqPage.a11_reason2: I whakamahia tēnei tikanga utu i tētahi pūkete anō.
faqPage.a11_reason3: I kite te pūnaha he koe, te hoa, e whakamahi ana hoki i te pūkete kiritaki.
faqPage.a11_policy: I te mea he $100 mō ia hokohoko tō mātou utu, he nui ake tērā i tō mātou whiwhi mai i te kiritaki ahakoa i muri i te 1 tau, he kaupapahere māori ā mātou ki te mau i ngā tūtohu kāore e tutuki ana i ā mātou aratohu. Mehemea e tūtohu ana koe i tētahi hoa i tētahi kiritaki rānei, homai noa he hononga i tētahi kaupuni rānei. Kaua e tohaina ngā momo utu ā kaua e whakamahi i te pūkete.
faqPage.a11_reviewTos: Tiro hoki i ā mātou tikanga hoa konei:
faqPage.q12: 12. He kaihoahoa/kaiwhakawhanake ahau ā ka tūtohu ahau i ngā kiritaki. He pai tērā?
faqPage.a12_line1: Ehara tēnei mahere i te mahi me mātou (i tētahi atu hōtaka hoa manaaki rānei). Ka rite ngā ōrite i ngā pūkete maha, ka hinga ngā utu.
faqPage.a12_line2: Ko tēnei mahi ki te ārai i tētahi tangata ki te hainatia ā whiwhi moni mai i tō mātou hōtaka hoa mā te tūtohu i a ia anō.
faqPage.a12_line3: Tērā pea ka hiahia koe ki te manaaki i ngā kiritaki tōtika ā utu ana i a rātou anō mā tētahi mea pēnei i PayPal. Ka taea e koe te hoko i tētahi pūkete manaaki hoko anō mai i a mātou ā tīmata.
faqPage.q13: 13. Ki hea ka tautuhia ai tōku utu?
faqPage.a13: Ka taea e koe te tautuhia tō utu,
